entry.title: WE欠发达国家的旅游业利弊相当
entry.content:
题目：

The disadvantages of tourism in less developed countries is as great as the advantages. What is your opinion?


作答:

The controversial topic with respect to the relationship between tourism and less developed countries never fails to attract public attention. There has been a heated debate on whether the advantages of tourism in less developed countries is as great as the disadvantages. As far as I am concerned I tend to be an advocate regarding this issue. My explanation will be illustrated in the following part of this essay.

It is reasonable for me to believe that the tourism industry is of great importance due to the fact that it can bring remarkable economic growth for the less developed country. However, it can be seen that with the increasing inbound tourism more and more traditional artifacts were being damaged. Therefore, tourism can not only leads to economic growth but also causing damage to valuable artifacts.

In contrast, there are quite a few to hold the opinion that it is of less value to scale between advantages and disadvantages caused by tourism in less developed countries. This argument does not hold water at all since people must realize that it’s not worth it when sacrificing valuable artifacts in exchange for economic growth. There is a finding conducted by the researchers at the University of Cambridge that figured out aobut 75% of historical relics damaged in a large volume of tourism activities.

In a nutshell, I may safely reach the conclusion that the advantage of tourism in less developed countries is as great as the disadvantage.

Reference:

  1. 雅思写作头脑风暴：大力发展旅游业。

entry.title: CCL腰痛复诊
entry.content:
Miss. Guo who previously suffered from the lumbago is talking to her GP again

IDOriginalTranslated
E1Good Morning Mr. Guo, how are you feeling, has the pain in your lower back improved?早安郭先生，您的感觉如何, 你的腰疼好些了吗?
M1早上好医生， 我的腰还是老样子，每次我打喷嚏或咳嗽我都会觉得疼。 你叫我去拍X光， 又叫我去做骨密度测试， 结果出来了么？The pain is still the same. Every time I cough or sneeze, I feel pain. You asked me to have an X-Ray and another bone density test are the results out?
E2Yes, I received you X-Ray
M2骨质疏松， 啊， 对了，
E3Precisely, the lack of calcium in your bone susceptible (易受影响) Persistent (持续不断)
M3这个病该怎么治呢， 我儿子让我吃钙片， 我现在一天吃一片儿， 您说这有用么？To take calcium tablets, syaing that it will make me less susceptible to fractures.
E4calsium tablets can reduce, but effectiveness is low , pers other medi
M4咳， 吃得要略来越多了， 这个药怎么吃？ 我怕吃这么多药， 虽然老毛病治好了， 却患了新毛病。take so much medication new problem will occurs after old been cured.
E5You take medication empty sotmach you will need to avoid food and laying down for half an hour follow it may cause Reflux (胃酸逆流) , so I recommend you to ceaseAnti-Inflammatory Medication (消炎药)
M5可是我的腰还是很疼啊，(Paracetomal: 扑热息痛还能不能吃)；But my back still hurt, can I continue take paracetomal
E6You can continue adverse
M6好的谢谢您， 希望能把这个

背景:

Lumbag: 腰痛 /lʌm’beɪgəʊ/ A common, painful condition affecting the lower portion of the spine (脊柱).
Low back pain is caused by injury to a muscle (strain) or ligament (sprain). Common
causes include improper lifting, poor posture, lack of regular exercise, a fracture, a (ruptured disc 腰椎间盘突出) or arthritis (关节炎).
Often, the only symptom is pain in the lower back.
People may experience:
Pain areas: in the back, muscles and bones, hip, or leg
Sensory: leg numbness or pins and needles
Also common: back joint dysfunction or muscle spasms
Most low back pain goes away on its own in two to four weeks. Physiotherapy and pain
relievers can hel . A few cases may require surgery

重点:

entry.title: CCL疗乳腺癌
entry.content:
Mrs Wu, is consulting her doctor about the breast cancer.

背景:

Breast Cancer 乳腺癌: Symptoms of breast cancer include a lump(肿块) in the breast, bloody discharge (出血) from the nipple (乳头) and changes in the shape or texture of the nipple or breast.
乳腺癌的症状包括乳房内的肿块，乳头流出的血以及乳头或乳房形状或质地的改变。

Treatment depends on the stage of cancer. It may consist of chemotherapy (化疗), radiation (方疗) and surgery.
治疗取决于癌症的发展阶段。它可能包括化疗、放疗和手术。

        
        
IDOriginalTranslated
E1我真是不明白为什么我会得乳腺癌呢？ 我一直认为癌症应该是老年人的问题。I really don’t understand why I got breast cancer. I always thought cancer is a Geriatric problem.
M1Breath cancer is very common among middle age people. There many factors that can leads to breast cancer. For example, never having given birth to a baby, and having had problem with breast feeding.乳腺癌在中年人中非常普遍。有很多因素可以导致乳腺癌。例如，从未生过孩子，并且母乳喂养有问题。
E2我还以为没什么大不了的， 我当时要是注意一点就好了，现在想来， 那些得乳腺癌的名人好像都没有生过小孩。No wonder I haven’t had any milk since I gave birth to my daughter. I thought it was no big deal. Now I come to think of it, none of those celebrities with breast cancer seem to have had children.
M2Well that’s not the only reasons, modern lifestyle, dite and environmental factors can also be risk factors. I have your X-Ray here. From these pictures we can see there is an abnormal growth in your left breast.嗯，这不是唯一的原因，现代生活方式，饮食和环境因素也可能是危险因素。我这里有你的X光片。从这些图片中我们可以看到您的左乳房有异常生长。
E3是不是把肿块切除就可以了， 我听说乳腺癌还算是治愈率比较高的癌症， 不像肝癌什么的， 得了就基本上等于判死刑了。if I have the lump removed, would I be fine? I heard that the cure rate of breast cancer is higher than others. No like liver cancer, if you get it, you will basically be sentenced to death.
M3The problem is the growth (增生), compare with the last month this lump has grow bigger. So Mastectomy (乳房切除术) will be the best option for you. Otherwise the cancer cells may invade (入侵) other tissue with in the body.问题是增生，和上个月相比这个肿块变大了。所以乳房切除术将是你最好的选择。否则癌细胞可能会侵入体内的其他组织。
E4乳房切除术？ 真的需要这样么？ 看来我的问题还很严重可是我不愿意做这个手术你知道这将影响到我的体型的。Mastectomy? Is this really necessary? It seems that my problem is still very serious, but I don’t want to do this operation. You know it will affect my body shape.
M4Well, this is the only way to cure your breast cancer I am afraid, otherwise Metastasis (转移) can cause great damage to other part of your body, and could be much difficult to control.好吧， 恐怕这是治愈乳腺癌的唯一方法，否则转移会对身体其他部位造成很大的损害，而且很难控制。
E5好的那术后需要多长时间来恢复呢？Okay, so how long can I recover after the surgery.
M5You need to have review, within 3 month of the surgery, this is to make sure there is no Metastasis in the peripheral areas.你需要在手术后3个月内进行复查，以确保没有转移到周边区域。
E6三到六个月也不是很长的时间， 我想我可以做这个手术， 那手术会安排在什么时间呢？ 我这周五有一个很重要的会议。 我想等那以后再手术。Three to six months is not a long time. I think I can have the operation. When will the operation be scheduled? I have a very important meeting this Friday and I want to wait until then。
M6That’s fine but you need fast for 24 hours before the surgery.很好，但是您需要在手术前24小时禁食。
重点:

entry.title: CCL食物中毒
entry.content:
Mr Smith is a British man working at a branch of a multinational corporation in Beijing. He has suddenly felt dizzy(晕眩的) and fatigued (疲乏), and has come to a nearby hospital, where he sees doctor Wei.

        
        
IDOriginalTranslated
M1史密斯先生你好可以简单请您简单的描述一下你的病情么？Hello Mr. Smith, could you please briefly describe your condition?
E1Well, the weather was really nice today, so I decided to go for a walk in the park. At first everything seemed fine, but an hour later I started to feel dizzy and lacked the energy to do anything.今天天气很好，所以我决定去公园散步。 刚开始好像一切都正常，但是一个小时以后我开始感觉头晕并且没力气做任何事。
M2恩，这样吧，我先给您量一下体温和血压好吗？ 嗯，36.8°，体温很正常。 低压80，高压120，也很正常啊。您最近休息得好吗？I see. I’ll check your body temperature and blood pressure now. Hmm, your temperature is 36.8° degrees Celsius., that’s very normal. Your blood pressure is 120 over 80, which is also very normal. Have you been resting well lately?
E2Yes I go to bed before 10 everynight.是的，我每天晚上都在10点之前去睡觉。
M3嗯很好最近的工作压力大么？Hmm, good. Do you feel stress from work recentely?
E3It’s been Little more hectic (忙碌), Recently I was promoted to the deputy director (副总经理). And yesterday my colleagues threw party for me to celebrate. And I tried many delicious Chinese dishes.是有一些忙碌，我最近刚被提拔为我们公司的副总经理。 而且昨天我的同事给我开了一个 庆祝晚会，我尝试了很多美味的中国菜
M4哟， 那可真要祝贺您啦。 您都吃了那些东西啊？Ah! Then I must congratulate you (contratulations on you)! What kind of things did you eat?]
E4Thank you. I was most taken with the spicy chicken dish and stir-fried tofu. I also tried mushroom, and raw fish – which I had never eaten before – in fact my co-workers had to urge me to try it. When I finally gave in, I found it most delightful (非常好吃).谢谢。我很喜欢吃辣鸡肉料理和炒豆腐。我还尝试了蘑菇和生鱼，这些都是我之前从来没吃过的。事实上是我的同事怂恿我去尝试的。我最终屈服了，还发现它非常好吃。
M5我觉得问题就出现在这里。首先，吃野生动物存在着很大的危险性； 鲜蘑菇一定要确保无毒、干净才可以吃；海鲜也最好不要生吃。I think this is where the problem started. Eating wild animals is very risky. Firstly, raw mushrooms should be checked to see if they are non-poisonous and clean before eating. As for seafood, it’s best not eaten raw.
E5Oh, I had no idea. During yesterday’s festivities (庆祝活动), I tried many dishes I didn’t even know the names for. So from now on, I will be more careful about what I eat.噢，我不知道。在昨天的庆祝活动上，我尝试了许多我连名字都叫不上来的菜。从现在开始，我将会对要入口的食物更加谨慎。
M6对，“吃一堑，长一智”嘛！这样吧，我先给您开一个药方吧。每天早中晚三次，一次三片。一个疗程后就您就会感觉好些了！You can put it down to experience / (take it as a lessons learned). OK, so I’ll write you out a prescription. Take three tablets a day, morning, noon and night. After one course you should feel much better.
E6Thank you.谢谢
重点:

entry.title: CCL经济舱症
entry.content:
A yong women is consultanting her GP about Air-Travel

背景

Economy class syndrome 经济舱并发症: the formation of blood clots (血凝块) in veins (静脉) deep within the legs deep vein thrombosis (深度静脉血栓), occuring during (or just after) a long airplane flight, especially in economy class (tourist class) where there is the least space allotted per passenger and legs tend especially to be immobilized for lack of leg room.

The economy class syndrome is directly related to immobility for long periods during which blood pools in the legs, raising the risk of clot formation. The tendency to immobility is often compounded by the fasten-seat belt sign, the presence of carts in the aisles, etc.
Other risk factors (风险因素) contributing to the syndrome include lower oxygen pressure and dehydration. Changes in oxygen pressure in the cabin tend to decrease the oxygen level in the blood. The air in the cabin lacks the normal degree of humidity which contributes to dehydration. The serving of coffee, tea and alcoholic beverages (all of which are diuretics) further causes passengers to become dehydrated.
The economy class syndrome is not confined(受限制) to that class on a plane. It is recommended that all persons traveling on air flights, irrespective of which clss they are in, drink lots of water and move their legs by salking whenever possible and by periodically flexing and extending their ankles, knees, and hips(臀部) to minimize risk of economy class syndrome. Deep Vein Thrombosis is potentially serious and can even have fatal consequences.

        
        
IDOriginalTranslated
E1Good Afternoon Miss Xu, I understand you about to go to Europ for a month long holiday.下午好，徐小姐，我了解到你要去欧洲度假一个月。
M1是的医生这也是我今天来见你的原因，最近在电视和报纸上报道了许多关于经济舱综合症的事儿，我这次到欧洲旅游要乘20多个小时的飞机， 买的就是经济舱的票， 您说我会得经济舱综合症么？Yes, doctor, that’s why I came to see you today. Recentely, there have been a lot of reports about Economic-Class-Syndrome on TV and Nespapers. It will take me over 20 hours to fly to Europe, I bought an economic ticket. Do you think I will get Economic-Class-Syndrome?
E2There are many factors that can predispose someone to developing economy class syndrome. These factors can be genetic (基因； /dʒɪ’netɪk/) or life style realted, seating still for long period of time is unfortunately one of them, which is why its ofen occurs among travellers on long distance air-flight.有很多因素会使人容易患上经济舱综合征。这些因素可能是基因或生活方式的关系，不幸的是，长时间坐着不动是其中之一，这就是为什么它经常发生在长途飞行的旅客中。
M2对， 我就是看了九号电视台的新闻时事节目， 才知道远程飞行可能会导致经济舱综合症的， 以前我从没听说过这种病也不了解所以非常担心。Yes, I just watched A current Affair on Channel Nine and realized that long-distance flight may cause Economy Class Syndrome. I have never heard of this disease before and I don’t understand it.
E3Ok, how about people who suffer from it, almost always have additional risk factors. Such as Coronary Heart Disease, smoking and family history of thrombosis or a high doses of Combined Oral Contraceptives. Do any of this apply to you?好吧，那么患有这种病的人呢， 他们几乎总是有另外的风险因素， 如冠心病，吸烟和家族遗传的血栓或高剂量的复方口服避孕药。
M3我正在服用复方口服避孕药是这个医疗中心的另一位医生给我的，不过我没有家族史， 从不吸烟， 也没有心脏病。I’m on a Combined Oral Contraceptives pill that was given to me by another doctor at this medical center, but I have no family history, never smoked, and I don’t have a heart disease.
E4The risk of you getting DVT during your flight is very low. and that risk can be further reduced if you heed a number of recommendations你在飞行中患上深度静脉血栓(Deep Vein Thrombosis)的风险非常低。如果你听从一些建议，这种风险可以进一步降低
M4要不要停止服用我的避孕药呢？ 我的朋友建议我吃阿司匹林， 说这样能减少我得经济舱综合症的风险， 这是真的吗？Should I stop taking my Combined Oral Contraceptives? My friend suggested me to take aspirin, saying it would reduce the risk of getting Economy Class Syndrome. Is this true?
E5You don’t need to cease to taking your pills as the risks a lot, and for aspirn its may cause excessive bleeding in some cases. So I would not recommend that you take it as a preventative measure.你不必停药，因为风险太大，而且阿司匹林有时会引起大出血。 所以我不建议你把它作为一种预防措施。
M5听你解释后我就放心了心了， 我平时很少坐长途飞机， 所以担心会得这种综合症， 现在我不担心了， 谢谢你医生。After hearing your explanation, I feel relieved. I don’t take long-distance flights often, so I am worried about developing this syndrome. Now I am not worried anymore. Thank you doctor.
E6You are welcome, have a safe and happy trip.不用谢，一路平安，旅途愉快。
重点

entry.title: CCL家庭暴力
entry.content:
Coming Soon

IDOriginalTranslated
E1
M1
E2
M2
E3
M3
E4
M4
E5
M5
E6
M6

  1. 不知道，要是他知道了我就永远躲不开他了。
    If he knew, I wouldn’t be able to get rid of him [虚拟语气 subjunctive mood.], No he doesn’t

  2. I’ll find out when he actrually received, and if he sent flowers after the order had been served on him, he is in breach we need go straight back to ccourt.
    我会查一下他是什么时候收到这个法令的， 如果她的在订花之后收到的法令

  1. 你看我也不想让他收到惩罚， 我只想让他不要， 你说够我们需要再回法庭， 为什么要这么做。
    As you can see, I don’t want punish him, I want him to stay away from me.

  1. before you we just put an interim to keep your husband away, when we go back again next week we need to present more evidence.

  2. 我之前， 会提交地址， 他会来抓我的。
    Last time in court I provided my address to the judge, and this time if I ······ and he will come to get me.

  3. Don’t worry the court will let you write your address on a piece of paper, and handed to the Magistrate.
    不用担心， 法官会让你把地址写在一张纸上，并交给法官。

  5. Evidence that approved he did actrually beat you physically. Did you have go to doctor after one of these incidents?

  6. 我是有这样的证据， 昨天我看我蜜月的照片， 我穿了件无袖上， 两个胳膊上确实有淤青， 你能相信么他那个时候都在打我。
    I do have such evidence, yesterday I was looking at (took a look at / was checking out the) pictures taken during our honeymoon, I was wearing a sleeveless top and there were bruises on my arms, can you belive that he even bit me during our honeymoon.

重点:

entry.title: CCL投资咨询
entry.content:
Enquiries about investment options

IDOriginalTranslated
M1您好。 非常感谢你这么短时间就过来见我。 我过来是想聊一聊投资的事情。 首先我想知道自己住房需要付增值税么？Hello. Thank you for coming to see me at such short notice. I have some ivestment enquireies to discuss with you. Firstly, I’d like to know if I need to pay capital gains tax on a property I’m buying to live in myself?
E1No, you don’t and thank you for coming in today. Could you tell me what kind of plans you have for your investment?不，你不用，谢谢你今天来。你能告诉我你有什么样的投资计划吗？
M2那就好。我打算买些投资房， 我听说买公寓的镂花是不用付印花税的， 对吧？That’s good. I’m planning tobuy some investment properties. I heard that you don’t have to pay stamp for buying apartmetns off-the-plan, is that right?
E2Yes, you’re right. You may be eligible for a First Home Owner Grant. When your property is settled, you can hand it over to real estate agents to manage. They will give you a set return on investment.你是对的。您可能有资格获得“首次置业者补助金”。财产结算后，您可以将其交给房地产经纪人进行管理。 他们会给你固定的投资回报。
M3那么， 投资回报一般是多少呢， 够我还房贷么？How much return can I get? Would that be enough for me to pay my mortgage?
E3It should be enough. ROI varies from 4% to 6%. The good thing is depreciation of your preperty and the furniture you buy can be used to offset the tax.应该足够了。投资回报率从4％到6％不等。好处是您的财产贬值，您购买的家具可以用来抵税。
M4那太好了。 我也在担心交税的问题， 和每个季度要填写的商业活动报表， 真是复杂啊。That’s great. I’m also concerned about paying tax, and the Business Activity Statement that I have to fill in each quarter, it seems really complicated.
E4You’re right. The ATO stipulates that if the turnover of a business is over $76,000, you’re advised to register for GST and lodge your BAS every 3 months.你是对的。 澳大利亚税务局(ATO)规定，如果企业营业额超过$ 76,000，建议您每三个月注册一次商品及服务税(GST)并提交您的(BAS)营业活动报表。
M5嗯， 我记住了。 如果净收入10万以上的话， 成立家庭信托账户比较有用， 对吧？Yeah, I remember that. If the gross is over $100,000, a family trust would be useful, is that right?
E5Ah, yes. You can also use your ABN for all of these. However, if you want to register a formal company, then you will need to apply for a ACN.是的。您也可以将澳大利亚企业注册码(ABN)用于所有这些。但是，如果要注册正式公司，则必须申请澳洲公司注册号(ACN)。
M6好的， 我想这些我都明白。 商会的人建议我可以考虑买农场， 屠宰场或葡萄酒厂， 你觉得我该选哪一个？Ok, I think I understand everything you have talked about. Someone in the Chamber of Commerce recommended that I consider buying a farm, abbattoir or winery. Which do you think I should choose?
E6Well I think a winery would probably be a good Choice. The market is growing exponentially.嗯，我想酿酒厂可能是个不错的选择。市场呈指数级增长。

重点:

entry.title: CCL老母授权
entry.content:
IDOriginalTranslated
E1Good afternoon, Mr. Lu. What can I do for you?下午好，陆先生。我能为您做些什么?
M1我这次来是因为我的母亲。她已经83岁了， 患阿尔兹海默症已经五年了。 最近她的病情已经恶化到她无法管理自己财政的地步了， 所以我想在她还有认知能力的时候签一份授权书， 让我做她的代理人。The appointment is for my mother. She is 83 and has had Alzheimer’s disease for five years. Her condition is so serious that she can’t manage her finances. So we’d like her to arrange a power of attorney while she is still capable, appointing me as her executor.
E2I see. And you have discussed this with her already?我知道了。您已经和她讨论过了吗？
M2是的。 上次她忘了付电话费， 结果电话线被公司切断了， 我无法打电话跟她练习， 还以为出了什么事， 吓了一大跳。 从那之后她也承认授权书有它的好处了。Yes. She forgot to pay her telephone bill last time so the telephone company cut off her service. We couldn’t get in touch with her, so we were terrified at the thought that something bad might have happened. So since then she has also accepted that signing a power of attorney is in her interests.
E3I’m sorry to hear about her decline. Given the circumstances, I gather you would be wanting an enduring power of attorney rather than a general one then?听到她的衰退， 我很遗憾。 这个情况下， 我想你应该是想要一份持续授权委托书而不是一份普通的授权委托书。
M3我并不知道授权书分为两类。 这两者之间有什么区别呢？I didn’t know there are <>two types of power of attorney. What’s the difference between them?
E4A general power of attorney will terminate when the person who made it loses mental capacity. An enduring power of attorney can continue to pay her bills, manage her accounts etc. on her behalf.普通授权委托书将在授权委托书的订立人丧失精神能力时终止。 持久授权书可以代表她继续支付账单、管理账户等
M4对我们需要的就是第二种。 这种持久授权书该如何办理呢？ 我是不是得将我母亲带到您这儿呢？Yes, the later is what we need. How can we get a power of attorney? Do I need to bring my mother here?
E5Yes. Your mother would need to sign the enduring power of attorney in the presence of an appropriate witness. I would have to explain the document and its implications> to her and assess whether she has understood before witnessing her signature.是的。你母亲需要在合适的证人在场的情况下签署永久授权,。我必须向她解释文件及其含义(可能的影响)，并在她签字之前评估她是否理解。
M5行， 您下周有没有空？ 有空我就带我的母亲到这里来。 还得麻烦您此草这份授权书。Fine. Are you available next week? If so I’ll bring my mum here. Please also draft the document.
E6You can download a Power of Attorney form from the NSW Guardianship Tribunal website, and get her to either fill it out at home, or fill it out here with my help.你可以从新南威尔士州(NSW)监护人仲裁庭的网站上下载一份授权书表格，让她在家填写，或者在我的帮助下在这里填写。
M6这份表格这么重要， 我想如果您能帮忙填的话就不太容易出错。This form is so important that I think it would be less error if you can help us fill it out.

重点:

entry.title: CCl钻脚上庭
entry.content:
IDOriginalTranslated
E1You swore yesterday to tell the truth and nothing but the truth. Lying under oath constitutes perjury and it could incriminate you.你昨天发誓要讲真话，而且只讲真话。宣誓后说谎构成伪证罪，可能会使你受到牵连。
M1没问题。 我是个守法和信奉宗教的人， 从来都说真话， 而且我已经当着法官、 律师和陪审团的面， 手按圣经发过誓了。No problem. I am a law-abiding and religious person who always tells the truth. Also I have sworn on the bible before the judge, lawyers and jury.
E2You said during examination-in-chief that on the 23rd of Aprial, 2009 you were drilling holes in some cylinders. Then you had accidently hit the workbench and you dropped the drill which landed on your right foot. Is that right?您在总检查中说，2009年4月23日，您在一些钢瓶上钻孔。然后，您不小心碰到了工作台，钻头掉落了在你右脚上的， 是这样么？
M2那一天呢， 有一批货到了， 外面的工人正在用叉车卸货， 然后， 他们把这些东西堆放到最高的架子上。That day, a shipment just arrived. The workers outside were using the forklift to unload all the cargo. They then stacked on the highest shelf.
E3According to your legal representative, you suffered excruciating pain in your right foot, Correct?根据您的法律代表 / (律师)，您的右脚遭受了极大的痛苦对吗？
M3不仅仅是砸到了我的脚上， 我的腰部和头部也受了伤。 急救人员把我送到了， 我的头部缝了五针。 大夫为我安排了康复计划。Not only my foot was hit, but my back and head were also injured. The first aid people / (Paramedic) sent me to the hospital where I had five stitches on my head. The doctor arranged a rehabilitation program/ (recovering plan) for me.
E4I put it to you that you have exaggerated your injuries in order to get more money for compensation. The specialists for the insurance company stated in their reports that you fully recovered and you could return to your normal duties.我告诉你，你夸大了自己的受伤程度，为的是得到更多的赔偿。保险公司的专家在他们的报告中说，你已经完全康复，可以恢复正常工作了。
M4虽然我的脚已经恢复， 但是腰部仍然痛的厉害。 X光照片显示， 我的椎间盘突出。I Though my foot has recovered, my back still hurts badly. The X-ray shows that I have a protruded disc.
E5I put to you that your back problem is due to pre-existing degenerative(退化) changes caused by age. I have evidence to prove that you’re as fit as a fiddle (非常健康；身体很好) now. A video shows you power-walking with your workmate in your suburb on the 8th of February 2010.我告诉你，你的背部问题是由年龄引起的预先存在的退行性变化 (退化) 引起的。我有证据证明你现在身体很好。一段视频显示，2010年2月8日，你和你的同事在郊区快步走。
M5在播放录像之前， 我必须说明一下这人的身份， 据称她长得很像我， 但你必须注意， 我有一个孪生姐姐， 她就住在我这条街上， 就在我隔壁。Before playing the video I have to clarify the identity of this person. It is said that she looks very much like me. But you need to realize that I have a twin sister who lives on the same street, right next door to me.
E6I haven’t seen any information regarding this person in the file. Can you please give me more details about your twin sister?我在文件中没有看到有关此人的任何信息。你给我能提供更多关于你的双胞胎妹妹的详细信息吗？
M6她叫王琳， 我们2004年一起来的澳洲。 她现住在我那条街的18号， 现在在一家超市做会计。Her name is Wang Lin. We came here together in 2004. She lives in No. 18 on the same street as me and works as an accountant in a supermarket.

重点:

拓展：

entry.title: CCL朝阳租房
entry.content:
IDOriginalTranslated
M1您好， 有什么可以帮到您吗？Hello, how can I help you today?
E1Hello. My name’s Gary Brown. I’ve just moved to the area and I’m looking for an apartment to rent.你好。我叫加里·布朗。我刚搬到这个地区，正在找一套公寓出租。
M2您好， 布朗先生。 你想住在北京的哪一块而呢？Hello, Mr. Brown. Where do you want to live in Beijing?
E2Well, I’m starting my new job as a DJ for Tango Club in Chaoyang district, so I would like to get a place relatively close to my workplace and the subway.好的， 我的新工作是朝阳区探戈俱乐部的DJ (音乐主持人)，所以我想找一个离工作地点和地铁都比较近的地方。
M3嗯， 我知道这个俱乐部， 很受外国人的欢迎。 来， 您看看这份传单， 上面列出了目前朝阳区可以租的房子。 您想住几间卧室的呢？ 有什么特殊需要么？Ah, I know that club. It’s very popular with foreigners. Here, have a look at this leaflet, it lists all the properties currently available in Chaoyang. How many bedrooms would you like? Do you have any special requirements?
E3I’m looking for a place with a decent-sized kitchen, as well as an extractor fan. A one-bedroom or studio apartment would be fine, but I’m open to two even three-bedroom apartments if they’re available我正在找一个地方，有一个像样的厨房，以及一个排气扇。一居室或一室一厅的公寓都可以，但如果有两个甚至三个卧室的公寓，我也可以接受。
M4我知道很多外国人不喜欢蹲式厕所， 对吧？ 嗯， 您看第四页， 上面是位于光华路目前可以租的房子。I know many foreigners don’t like squat toilets, right? Hmm, Have a look on the fourth page, It lists information about properties currently available for rent on Guanghua Road.
E4I see that’s a one-bedroom place. You guys are asking ¥3000 a month. Well, that’s way out of my budget.我知道那是一居室。你们要求3000块人民币一个月。嗯，这超出了我的预算。
M5朝阳区的价格贵， 这是肯定的。 但是您看下755号这间， 才¥2200元而且刚刚装修过， 里面还有壁炉呢。Chaoyang is an expensive district, that’s for sure. But have a llook at the one on 755. Only 2200 yuan and it’s recently renovated. It even has a fireplace.
E5When was the building built? I rented an apartment in Macau last year that was built sometime in the 80s. The elevator only worked until midnight. You can imagine coming home after a night shift and having to walk 10 flights of stairs.大楼是什么时候建成的我去年在澳门租了一套公寓，是在80年代的某个时候建的。电梯只开到午夜。你可以想象当你上完晚班回家，还得爬10层楼梯。
M6这没问题的。 这楼是2001年建成的， 电梯一周七天24小时运行。That won’t be a problem. This building was built in 2001, and the elevator runs 24/7.
E6Well that’s good. Well I’m guessing, then, that the utilities bills are extra? And how about the bond? How much is that?好,很好。我猜，水电费是要另外算的， 那么押金如何呢？那个多少钱？
M7对， 租客需要自己负担水电煤网的费用。 押金的话， 相当于三个月的租金， 还有一个月的押金， 签字的时候交。 这是在中国约定俗成的。That’s right, tenants pay for their own electricity, water and gas. As for bond, it’s 3 months’ rent plus a one-month security deposit when you sign. This is standard practice all over China.

重点:

拓展：

entry.title: CCL钻头扎脚
entry.content:
IDOriginalTranslated
E1Good morning, Mr Li. I’ve asked you to come in because your worker’s compensation case is being heard next week. You have a conference with the barrister on Monday, but before you see her, I’d like to check some information about your accident.李先生，早上好。我已要求您参加，因为下周将审理您的工人的赔偿案。您星期一与大律师举行会议，但是在您见到大律师之前，我想查看一些有关您的事故的信息。
M1好的， 不过事情已经过去一年多了， 我不一定记得所有的细节了。 法院也算是认真的， 拖了这么久才开庭。Ok, but it’s been more than one year ago, So I may not be able to remember all the details. The court has delayed the hearing for so long.
E2Not to worry. I’ve got your file here, so we can use that to refresh your memory. It says here that the accident at CMB Manufacturing happened in August 2008. Can you tell me how long you’d been working there before you had the accident?不要担心。我这里有你的档案，我们可以用来帮助你回忆。 这里说事故发生于2008年8月在CMB 制造厂。 你能告诉我在发生事故之前你在那里工作了多长时间吗？
M2我之前在另一家公司工作， 后来我回国了， 因为我母亲生病了， 那好像是 ··· 我想想 ··· 2007 年底。 我大约在2008年3月开始在CMB工作。I used to work for another company, afterwards I went back to China because my mother was sick. That was … let me see … at the end of 2007. I started working for CMB in March 2008.
E3you’d been at CMB for about five months. Now, can you tell me exactly what you were doing when the accident happened您已经在CMB待了五个月。现在，您能确切告诉我事故发生时您在做什么吗？
M3当时我正在给金属圆筒钻孔。 有个叫Frank的同事走了过来， 开始开始跟我说话。I was drilling on a metal cylinder. A workmate called Frank came and began talking to me. He is kind of person like making joke. He did this to everyone. Sometimes, he did stupid things.
E4It would be better to restrict yourself to describing exactly what happened on the day in question. So Frank came over to talk to you. What happened then.你最好限制自己只是描述当天发生的事。 所以 Frank 过来跟你讲话。 然后发生了什么？
M4他评论了几句我身上的T恤。 然后他开始挠我的痒。 我很怕痒的， 所以我挥动手臂来制止他。 我拿着钻头的手打到了墙壁。 我觉得很疼， 手一松， 钻头就掉在我的脚上。He made some comments about the T-shirt I was wearing before tickling me. I am quite ticklish so I waved my arm to stop him. My hand that was holding the drill hit the wall and it was very painful so I lost my grip and the drill fell on my foot.
E5Then what happened?然后发生了什么？
M5经理来了， 他叫了救护车。 急诊室的医生清理了伤口， 但是几周之后不得不动了手术， 因为有些神经和肌腱损伤了。 我现在还在做理疗。The manager came and called the ambulance. The doctor in the emergency room cleaned up the wound. but I had to have surgery a few weeks later because some nerves and tendons were injured. I am still taking physiotherapy (理疗).
E6Fine. You’ll probably be appearing as a witness, which means you could be cross-examined by CMB’s barrister. Unless, of course, we reach an out-of-court settlement. Now, are there any question?好的。您可能会作为证人出庭，这意味着您可能会被CMB的大律师交叉盘问。当然，除非我们达成庭外和解。现在，有什么问题吗？
M6没问题了， 非常感谢您。No, Thank you very much.

重点:

拓展：

Cross examination by prosecution

entry.title: CCL操心妈妈
entry.content:
IDOriginalTranslated
E1Good afternoon. You must be Mrs. Li, John’s mother. My name is Adam Taylor. How are you today?下午好。你一定是约翰的母亲李太太。我叫亚当·泰勒。你今天好吗？
M1你好， 老师。 我儿子最近整天做白日梦， 快把我急死了。Hi teacher. My son has been daydreaming all day recently, it’s getting on my nerves.
E2Well, I’m surprised to hear that John is having a problem. He is a brilliant boy, and has been doing quite well at school. What exactly do you mean by daydreaming?嗯，我很惊讶听到约翰有问题。他是个聪明的孩子，在学校一直表现很好。你说的白日做梦到底是什么意思？
M2我们花了那么多钱和精力送他进了这里最好的私立小学。 一开始他还好好地， 每天认真学习。 那是从上个月， 他就变了个人似的。 有许多不切实际的想法。We spent a lot of money and effort sending him to the best privagte primary school. At first he was quite Ok, studying hard every day but since last month, he seems to have become another person and has many unrealistic thoughts.
E3You said that John has changed a lot since last month. Were there any unusual incidents that led to these changes? Also, what kind of changes are we talking about here?你说约翰上个月以来变化很大。有没有什么不寻常的事件导致了这些变化，我们在这里讨论的是什么样的变化?
M3他先是一直说自己想成为一个足球明星。 然后这周又开始说自己想做一个歌星。 我又不知道下周他得蹦出什么个奇怪的想法了。He first said he wanted to become a football star. But this week he said he wanted to become a singer. I’m not sure waht strange thoughts he will have next week.
E4I see. Please don’t be too worried. Small children are so imaginative that they are bound to have many thoughts. I think it’s a good sign in some way. It shows that John is an enthusiastic little boy..我知道了。请不要太担心。小孩子很有想象力，因此他们必然会有很多想法。我认为这在某种程度上是一个好兆头。它表明约翰是一个热情的小男孩。
M4你这么说好像也有道理， 不过， 他这么小小年纪的， 就总想当明星， 想出名， 我也不知道他从哪里学来那么多稀奇古怪的东西。What you just said seems to make sense, However, he always wants to be a star and be famous at such a young age. I don’t know where such strange thoughs come from.
E5Children today are exposed to all kinds of information, good and bad, so parents should be aware of what information their kids are receiving. He’s at a formative age, where he is trying to discover his interests and aptitudes.现在的小朋友能接触到很多不同的信息， 无论是好的还是不好的。 所以父母应该了解他们的还在就收到了什么信息。 你儿子正处于性格形成的年龄， 这个年龄的还则回去尝试发现他们自己的兴趣和才能。
M5天资和兴趣？ 请告诉我， 我怎么才能更好的知道我儿子的天资和兴趣呢？Aptitudes and interests? Please tell me how I can get a better idea of my son’s aptitudes and interests?
E6There are many ways. Pay attention to what subjects John likes the most, what he enjoys doing after school, and what he likes talking about at home.有很多方法。注意约翰最喜欢的科目，他喜欢放学后做什么，他喜欢在家里谈论什么。
M6跟你谈完之后， 我感觉我可能确实是小题大做了。 我不是很了解儿童的心里， 所以孩子的一点变化就让我感到恐慌。 现在我明白一些了。 谢谢你， 老师。after talking to you, I feel I was making too big deal out of it. Since I don’t know much about children’s minds, a slight change can have me panicking. Now I have a better understanding. Thank you, Mr Taylor.

重点:

entry.title: WE海外留学有必要吗
entry.content:
题号 101006


题目 1:

It is often argued that studying overseas is overrated. There are many scholars who study locally. Travel is or is not a necessary component of qualified education? To what extent do you agree or disagree?

作答:

The controversial topic with respect to studying abroad has never fails attract public attention. There has been a heated debate on whether study overseas is a necessary component of qualified education. As far as I am concerned I tend to be an advocate regarding this issue. My explanation will be illustrated in the following part of this essay.

It is reasonable for me to believe that study abroad is of great importance due to the fact that provides valuable opportunities for students to open up its horizon. It can be seen that students can be immersed in a multi-cultural environment and experiencing useful life lessons. Therefore, tudying overseas is not overrated, but a very essential component of qualified education.

In contrast, there are quite a few to hold the opinion that it is os less value to study abroad. This argument does not hold water at all since overseas studying is such a privilege for a student to have a chance to learn how to collaborate and communicate with others from different cultural backgrounds. There is a finding conducted by the researchers at the University of Adelaide that figured out more than 80% of the international company put the ability of work with diversity as one of their top 3 criteria when choosing candidates.

In a nutshell, I may safely reach the conclusion that studying oversea is a necessary component of qualified education based on the examples and results of the research.

重点

entry.title: WE书面考试是否有效评估学习成果
entry.content:
题号 101005


题目:

The formal written examination can be valid method to assess student’s learning aggree or disgree?

作答:

The controversial topic with respect to the method of student learning assessment never fails to attract public attention. There has been a heated debate on whether the formal written examination is a valid assessment method. As far as I am concerned, I tend to be an advocate regarding this issue. My explanation will be illustrated in the following essay.

It is reasonable for me to believe that the formal written exam is of great importance due to the fact that the formal written exam provides an uncertain environment for the student to solve the question they have never seen before. It can be seen that the student will need to answer the question within limited time and prescribed materials. Therefore, it can ensure the student demonstrate their capabilities to apply the knowledge they learned practically.

In contrast, there are quite a few to hold the opinion that it is of less value to assess student’s learning via the formal written examination. This argument does not hold water at all since, without a formal written examination, the preparation will be no longer necessary. However, there is a finding conducted by the researchers at the University of Melbourne has figured out that about 80% of learning actually occurs during the exam preparation period.

In a nutshell, I may safely reach the conclusion that the formal written examination can be a valid method to assess student’s learning based on the examples and results of the research.

entry.title: WE员工参与决策的利弊
entry.content:
题号 101004


题目:

Some employers involve employees in the decision-making process of products and services. What are the advantages and disadvantages?

作答:

The controversial topic with respect to employee involved decision-making never fails to attract public attention. There has been a heated debate on whether empowering employees to participates in the company decision-making brings advantages or disadvantages. As far as I am concerned, I tend to be an advocate regarding this issue. My explanation will be illustrated in the following part of this essay.

It is reasonable for me to believe that empowering employees to participate in the company decision-making process is of great importance due to the fact that It can boost employee’s motivation.
Its can be seen that employees can feel their voice been heard and has actual impacts on the final products and services. Therefore, getting employees involved in decision-making can have positive impacts on employee’s motivation.

In contrast, there are quite a few to hold the opinion that it is of less value to involving employees in the decision-making process. This argument does not hold water at all since the employee’s motivation is directly tied to an employee’s performance. There is a finding conducted by the researchers at the University of Cambridge that has figured out more than 85% of companies doubled their employee’s performance after launched the employee empowerment program.

In a nutshell, I may safely reach the conclusion that employee involvement can boost employee’s motivation and better performance based on the examples and results of the research.

重点

Reference:

  1. Employee Involvement Advantages and Disadvantages - WiseStep

entry.title: WE法律改变人的行为
entry.content:
题号 101003


题目:

Some people think human behaviors can be limited by laws, other think law have little effect. Waht is you opinion.

作答:

The controversial topic with respect to the relationship between law and human behaviors never failed to attract public attention. There has been a heated debate on whether the law can effectively limit human behaviors. As far as I am concerned, I tend to be an opponent regarding this issue. My explanation will be illustrated in the following part of this essay.

It is reasonable for me to believe that law is of great importance due to the fact that its law states how people may and may not behave in a society. It can be seen that without laws there will have no rules to follow when judging a criminal offense. Therefore, the law acts an essential role in regulating human behavior.

In, contrast, there are quite a few to hold the opinion that there is little that law can change in how human behaves. This argument does not hold water at all since people with no rule to obey can lead to chaos. For example, people can assault each other whenever they want without being charged. And there is a finding conducted by the researcher at the University of Melbourne has figured out that about 50% decrease in criminal offense after government conducted free popularization course on law.

In a nutshell, I may safely reach the conclusion that law is the essential rules that guiding people to behave in the right way based on the examples and results of the research.

重点:

entry.title: WE成长环境是否影响个人成就
entry.content:
题目：

Nowadays, people believe that the enviornment influences their accomplishments. Some people think their success and accomplishment were influenced by the places where they grew up. Do you think the environment does or does not affect people’s accomplisment and how it affects?

作答:

The controversial topic with respect to the relationship between environmental influences and people’s accomplishments never fails to attract public attention. There has been a heated debate on whether personal success and accomplishment can be affected by different environments. As far as I am concerned, I tend to be an advocate regarding this issue. My explanation will be illustrated in the following part of this essay.

It is reasonable for me to believe that the living environment is of great importance due to the fact that a better living environment can provides people with better access to resources. It can be seen that people with sufficient resources will have less concern on about food, cloth, and shelter. Therefore, as people fulfilled their basic needs they will rather pursueing needs from higher hierarchy, such as psychological and self-fulfillment needs.

In contrast, there are quite a few to hold the opinion that it is of less value to establish a correlation between personal accomplishment and success with their living environments. This argument does not hold water at all since no one can focusing on pursuing higher accomplishment while they are suffering from hunger, poverty, and insecurity. There is a finding conducted by the researchers at the University of Melbourne has figured out that 85% of the poor population never been to school. And, only one percent of world hungers ever thought about pursuing prestige.

In a nutshell, I may safely reach the conclusion that the environment does have a significant impact on people’s attainments and success, based on the examples and results of the research.

重点:

Reference:

  1. Maslow’s hierarchy of needs

entry.title: WE短文写作模版
entry.content:
pte Essay Writing 90 Marks Template


Introduction

The controversial topic with respect to _ (Topic) never fails to attract public attention. There has been a heated debate on whether _ (Question). As far as I am concerned, I tend to be an advocate/opponent (支持/反对) regarding this issue. My explanation will be illustrated in the following part of this essay.

Body (1)

正方论点: It is reasonable / evidently for me to believe that _(Topic) is of great importance due to the fact that _ (Point of Your Side). It can be seen that _ (Expand the Point), which indicates that _. As a result / Hence / Therefore, _____ (Repeat Your Point).

Body (2)

反方论点: In contrast, there are quite a few to hold the opinion that it is of less value to _____ (Opposite Point).

拆台: This argument does not hold water at all since _____(reason). [However, this argument is not convincing because they].

吹牛: There is a finding conducted BY the researchers at the University of Oxford has figured out that _____(Academic Support).

Conclusion

In a nutshell, I may safely reach the conclusion that _____(point of View) based on the examples and results of the research.

entry.title: python 实现深拷贝
entry.content:
在不使用 deepcopy() 的前提下， 实现对{ { 嵌套字典 } }的深拷贝


为什么要深拷贝?

当添加对拷贝的dictionary进行， 添加、 删除、 等 ···, 修操作的时候，原字典 与 拷贝的字典 之间会产生_ 相互影响_ (一个改变另一个也会随之改变)。

深拷贝 deepcopy:



上述 _相互影响_ 可通过 deepcopy() 解决， 由于深拷贝有别于正常逻辑下的普通拷贝和浅拷贝。


深复制: 将原有数据 完整的再复制 , 产生一个 全新独立 的个体。



浅拷贝: shallowcopy

浅拷贝: 在原有数据上 打上一个标签， 当标签被数据被修改， 原有数据会被改变， 其他的标签也会被改变。



深 v 浅

两者到底有什么不同？ 这里简单 <代码> 演示一下:

当字典只有一层时， 例🌰: { 1:'ONE' }

输出:

从上可以看出， 普通拷贝 d2 = d1 与 copy() 是有区别的， 普通拷贝在任何情况下都会被原始字典中的变化所改变， 而浅拷贝可以应对简单的字典数据， 然而不足以应对复杂的字典数据。


那么举一个复杂字典的例子🌰: { 1:{ 2:'TWO' } }

输出:

从上可以看出, 当原始字典存在多层嵌套时， 浅拷贝d2 = copy.copy(d1) 和 普通拷贝d2 = d1 均不能保证拷贝数据不受原始数据改变的影响； 从而在这种情况下我们需要使用copy.deepcopy()


然而我们这次的课题是： “在不实用deepcopy()的前提下实现对复杂字典的拷贝，并保证拷贝数据与原始数据不会相互影响。 所以👇🏻下面言归正传： ”


实现深拷贝

其实将 深拷贝 拆分为： 浅拷贝 + 递归 就容易理解多了

写一个函数, 通过递归 Recursion 来实现:


举例🌰说明: { 1:{ 2:{ 3:{ 4:'Four' } } } }

输出:

实战

Cleanup .csv data, and create dic copy that change one copy without changing the other.


Reference:

  1. python详解copy浅复制和deepcopy深复制、字典类型的copy以及” = “
  2. Python字典的深拷贝实现
  3. Python如何在dic（字典）里面添加dic（字典） 附dic基础知识

entry.title: WE毕业或工作前就结婚
entry.content:
题号 101001


题目:

It is argued that getting married before finishing school or getting a job is foolish. To what extent do you agree or disagree is not a wish decision.

作答:

The controversial topic with respect to getting married too early never fails to attract public attention. There has been a heated debate on whether it is rational or not to be getting married before they are graduated or get employed. As far as I am concerned, I tend to be the opponent(反对) regarding this issue. My explanation will be illustrated in the following part of this essay.

It is reasonable for me to believe that getting married too early is of great importance due to the fact that, marriage before graduation can leads to lower education levels than others. It can be seen that early marriage can occupy a large proportion of people’s energies and time, which indicates that it’s makes made harder to focusing on learning, while less time for absorbing knowledge. As a result, young people should not be allowed to get married too early.

In contrast, there are quite a few to hold the opinion that it is of less value to getting married after graduated or being employed. This argument does not hold water all, since as long as people not finishing their school, they are normally not mature enough, and therefore they are not ready for marriage. There is a finding conducted by the researchers at the University of Melbourne has figured out that more than 80% of the divorced family with parent married before graduate graduating from college.

In a nutshell, I may safely reach tee conclusion that people should not be getting married before graduated from school or starting their careers. based on the examples and results of the research.

重点:

Reference:

  1. testbig

entry.title: Convert .icon 格式转换
entry.content:
安装 imagemagick

$ brew install imagemagick

$ mv 文件名.png ~/desktop

$ cd ~/desktop

Convert:

$ convert -background transparent “文件名.png” -define icon:auto-resize=16,24,32,48,64,72,96,128,256 “文件名.ico”

更改图片大小 (例： 192 x 192)

convert 文件名.ico -resize 192x192 新文件名.png

Reference:

1.ImageMagick v6 Examples – Resize or Scaling (General Techniques)
2.Convert .JPG or .PNG to .ICO using terminal and back
3.Converting GIF’s, PNG’s and JPG’s to .ICO files using Imagemagick

entry.title: CCL老无所养
entry.content:
IDOriginalTranslated
E1Good morning, Mr. Li. My name is Susan. You put in a claim for a special benefit. You know you’ve come here for an interview regarding your claim, don’t you?李先生，早上好。我叫苏珊。您提出一项特殊福利金的请求。您是知道您来这里是为这个请求进行面试的对吗？
M1我知道， 你有什么问题尽管问好了， 反正我的材料都是真实的， 希望你能尽快做决定， 我已经等了好久了， 你们怎么这么慢呢？I know why I’m here. You can ask any questions you want. All of my documents are genuine. I hope you can make a decision as soon as possible. I have been waiting for a long time. Why is it taking so long?
E2We will try our best to make a decision as soon as we can. After this interview, you should hear from us in two weeks. According to your documents, you rent a place in Miranda. Is there any reason why you can’t live with your daughter?我们将尽力做出决定。采访之后，您应该在两周内收到我们的来信。根据您的文件，您在米兰达（Miranda）租了一个地方。有什么理由不能和女儿住在一起？
M2我前妻住在那里， 如果我再搬进去会特别不方便， 并且跟我前妻一见面就吵架， 还是不见的好。My ex-wife lives with her. It would be very embarrassing to live with them, basides, my ex-wife and I will argue ifwe see each other, so it is better not to see each other.
E3Fair enough. According to our records, you stopped working in 2012. How have you supported yourself since then?有道理, 根据我们的记录，您在2012年停止工作。自那时以来，您如何养活自己？
M3以前打工的时候存了点钱， 积蓄花完了之后， 都是我女儿在帮我。I saved some money when I worked. After I spent my savings my daughter supported me.
E4I see. FRom the bank statement you submitted before, you had $20,000 in your commonwealth Bank account, where did that money go我知道了。从您之前提交的银行对帐单中，您的联邦银行帐户中有2万块钱，这笔钱去了哪里？
M4我都花了， 我身体不好， 看医生要花钱， 我还开到了， 并且离婚也花了不少钱。I spent all of the money. It costs money to see doctors as I am not physically fit 身体不健康 and I also had an operation. I spent a lot of money on the divorce as well.
E5Es far as I know, it is free to have an operation. How much did you spend on your divorce?据我了解，手术是免费的。你离婚花了多少钱？
M5我不记得了， 反正很多钱I can’t remember. Anyway it was a lot of money.
E6Mr.Li, for us to make a decision, you need to submit some evidence to show where you money went. All the expenses have to be reasonable and only to meet your basic daily needs. I’ll give you 14 days to submit the supporting documents.李先生为了我们能做出决定， 你需要提交证明， 以证明你的钱用在什么地方， 所有的开销必须都是合理的， 并且只是用于日常的基本开销。 我会给你14天的时间准备并提交这些支持文件 (辅助材料)
M6我知道了， 我会尽快去搜集这些材料的。 我没有任何收入， 这是我唯一的希望， 你们要尽快做决定， 我的日子不好过啊。I understand. I will gather (prepare) those documents as soon as I can. I don’t have any income. This payment is my only hope. I hope you can make a decision soon. My life is really hard.

重点:

entry.title: CCL九元时薪
entry.content:
IDOriginalTranslated
E1Mr. Wang, I understan that you have lodged a complaint with us at Fair Work Australia and that you wish to speak with an advisor here. Can you tell me that exactly you’d like to work out with your former employer?王先生，我想知道您已在澳大利亚公平公正委员会向我们投诉，并希望在这里与顾问交谈。您能告诉我，您确认想与前雇主算账么？
M1我打从去年五月就在这家咖啡厅工作， 老板是华人， 处处欺负我， 少算我工资不提， 竟然无缘无故在我最需要收入的时候把我解雇了！I started working at this café in May last year. The owner is Chinese, but bullied me in every possible way. Besides miscalculation of my wages, he fired me without any explanation when I really needed the income.
E2It sounds like there are a few issues other than unfair dismissal. Firstly, can you tell me how exactly your employer miscalculated your wages?听起来，除了无故解雇你之外，还有其他一些问题。 首先，您能告诉我您的雇主究竟是如何误算了您的工资吗？
M2好的。 我的是心只不过是九元， 可是他竟然还不算我观点前清理厨房的半小时， 说什么那段时间咖啡厅没有客人， 没有生意也就没有理由负我额外的钱OK. My hourly rate was only 9 dollars. However, he didn’t count the half an hour of cleaning the kitchen before closing, saying that since there are no customers in the café during the period, no business means no reason to pay me.
E3What he did was actually illegal. Nine dollars an hour is well under the minimum wage. He’s obviously evaded income tax and short-changed you by expecting you to work extra hours which were not paid.他所做的实际上是非法的。每小时九美元远低于最低工资。他显然是在逃避所得税，并通过期望您加班而没有支付工资，从而使您变短了。
M3是啊， 但我初来乍到对这些权益都不了解， 加上看在他给我第一份工， 就这么忍受了他的不公待遇一年多了。 可是上周他突然叫我不用去上班了， 我一下子没了收入。Yes, but I put up with his unfair treatment because I didn’t understand there rights when I first arrived here and he gave me my first job. However, last weekend he just suddenly asked me not to work anymore.
E4Did you see any reason why he could possibly consider terminating your employment? You have worked for him for over 14 months so he must have been satisfied with you performance in general.您是否看到他为什么可以考虑终止您的工作的任何原因？您已经为他工作了14个月以上， 所以他一定满意你一直以来的的表现。
M4是的， 我工作勤奋又有效率， 我想很可能是因为他的外甥放暑假， 在找临时工， 他为了省钱才把我解雇。Yes, I’m a diligent and efficient worker. I think he fired me to save money because his nephew is on summer vacation and is looking for a temporary job.
E5We will certainly look into this. You mentioned he bullied you at work. Can you explain this in further detail?我们一定会对此进行调查。你提到他在工作中欺负你。您可以进一步详细解释吗？
M5没错， 他总是挑剔我的腔调， 说我和杨客人的对话听起来很滑稽， 笑我笨并常常骂我That’s right. He always picked on my accent and said that I sounded funny when talking with western customers. He mocked me, called me stupid and often called me names.
E6That does constitute bullying his repeted verbal taunts toward you were unreasonable. I believe we now have a clearer picture of your situation, I’ll make some notes in the complaint you’ve made and we shall get back to you this week.这确实构成了欺凌, 他重复的口头嘲讽对你是不合理的。我相信我们现在可以更清楚地了解您的情况，我会在您的投诉中记下一些记号，我们将在本周与您联系。
M6那太好了， 我会等你们给我电邮答复， 谢谢你了。That’s great, I’ll wait for your reply. Thank you.

重点:

entry.title: CCL建筑工伤
entry.content:
IDOriginalTranslated
E1Good Morning, Mr. Zhang. According to our records, you’ve booked an appointment today to talk about workers compensation Am I right?早上好，张先生， 根据我们的记录，您之前预订过一个会面，谈论关于职工补偿的问题，对吗？
M1是的， 我之前来过一次， 但是由于家里有急事， 就急忙赶回去了。Yes, I came once before but had a rush home due to a family emergency.
E2I see. I need to know as many details about the accident as possible. Could you start by telling me what you do for a living and how you got injured?我知道了， 我需要知道这个意外的细节
M2我是一个建筑工人， 非常熟悉操作规程(Protocols) 和安全规则， 至今没有出过一次事故。 可是两个月前， 我在搬运铁板的时候弄伤了胳膊。I’m a construction worker. I’m very familiar with operation and safety protocols and I had never got caught in an accident until two months ago when my arm got injured while I was moving iron plates planels.
E3Is the injury to your arm severe ? What treatment have you received so far? Also, what did your boss do after the accident?手臂受伤严重吗？到目前为止，您接受了什么治疗？另外，事故发生后您的老板做了什么？
M3老板把我送进医院， 他不让我说是怎么受的伤， 并且他保证会照顾我。 我怕不照他说的做我会工作不保， 所以说在打篮球的时候受伤的。My boss took me to the hospital. He told me not to say a word about how I got injured and promised he would take care of me. Fearing I’d lose my job if I didn’t do as he said I told the doctor that I injured myself while playing basketball.
E4It is apparent that your employer was worried that he might get into trouble because of your injury. So did your employer actually keep his promise to take care of you?显然，您的雇主担心他可能因您的受伤而惹上麻烦。那么，您的雇主是否真的信守了照顾您的诺言？
M4他根本没有。 他根本不给我付医药费， 也没有给我其他形式的金钱补助。 所以我今天才来寻求您的意见， 看看我能不能获得些工伤赔偿来维持生活。Not at all. He didn’t pay any of my medical bills or offer other forms of financial assistance. That’s whay I’m here today hoping to get your advice on claiming workers’ compenstation to ensure my livelihood.
E5Well, proving your case can be quit challanging, because your medical records all indicate a sporting accident as opposed to a workplace injury. We need to find witnesses, such as your co-workers who were at the scene at the time of the accident.好吧，证明您的情况可能很难，因为您的病历都表明是运动事故，而不是工作场所受伤。我们需要找到证人，例如在事故发生时在现场的同事。
M5证人的话我到是可以找得到。 当时在场有不少工友。 这之后会如何能？I should be able to find some (很多) witnesses. Many co-workers were there at the time. So what happens after that?
E6well, after collecting any relevant evidence, what you need to do is to lodge an application with the Workers Compensation Commission.在收集到所有相关证据之后， 您需要做的是向 *工人赔偿委员会* 提出申请。
M6希望希望最后我能报销我所有的医药费， 获得美洲的工伤赔偿及以及残疾福利。Hopefuly, I will be reimbursed (报销) for all my medical expenses and be granted weekly Workers Compensation, Disability Support Pension.

重点:

entry.title: CCL邻里纠纷
entry.content:
IDOriginalTranslated
E1Good afternoon Mrs Lai. My name is Time wilson and I’ll be looking after your case. Please take a seat and we can get started.下午好， 赖太太， 我叫 Tim Wilson, 我将会接手你的案子。 请坐， 我们可以开始了。
M1谢谢你来见我， 我从来没有和邻居发生过任何问题， 这真是一个很头疼的问题。Thank you for seeing me, Not once have I had a problem with my neighbours. This whole situation has been such a headache.
E2Yes, I read through your file, you said your neighbour, Bob Matt, used a chainsaw (电锯) to cut down the tree on the boundary between your house and his house, but he didn’t get your premission first. Is that correct?是的， 我已经读过你的档案， 你说你的邻居Bob Matt在没有征得你同意之前用链锯将你和他房子边界上的树砍了， 对吗？
M2上周四， 他连一个电话都不(Without even a phone call)打就把树砍倒了。 他也没有清理所有的树枝和树干， 弄的满地都是。 然后他还把下水管道 (Drainage Pipe / Sewerage Pipes ) 给弄坏了He just cut it down last Thursday without so much as a phone call. And he didn’t clean up all the twigs and branches either - he just left them all over the ground. Then he pulled the roots out as well, causing damage to the sewerage pipes.
E3I see, so do you have any idea why he will do such thing?我懂了， 你知道他为什么这样做么？
M3他跟我说他想在我们的房子之间修个栅栏。 他是个按摩师， 在家工作。 他说我们的孩子在院子里玩的时候太吵了， 会影响他的生意。 我可以理解这一点， 可是他太过分了。He told me he wants to build a fence between our properties. He’s masseur (男按摩师) and works from home. He says our children are too noisy when they play in the yard and that it disrupts his business. I understand that, but he went too far.
E4End tell me what kind of solution那么告诉我， 你想要怎么处理这件事呢？
M4我希望他能付钱请人来修理下水管道， 而且如果他真的很想修围栏的话， 我希望他在修之前跟我商量。I’d like him to pay for someone to fix the sewerage pipes and, if he really wants to go ahead with the fence, I want him to talk to me first before he puts it up.
E5Well, let me tell you a bit about mediation process, all right? We can set up a meeting between the two of you, along with a mediator who will help you two explore a variety of opitons to resolve your dispute.好的， 我先跟你讲一下调解的程序好么？ 我们会安排你们两个会面， 在一个调解员的陪同下帮你们从多种选项中探求解决办法。
M5我担心Bob可能不会参加我们的调解会议。 有什么办法可以确保他参加呢？I’m worried that Bob‘s may not attend our mediation session. Is there any way to make sure ensure he comes?
E6Mediation is voluntary process and no one will be forced to attend I’m afraid. But we will try our best to convince his of why it would he in his best interests to attend.调解过程是自愿的， 我有人会被强制参加。 但是我将会尽力劝说并告诉他参加调解对他是最好的。
M6那就麻烦你一定要说服他去， 我要把帐彻底算清楚。Please do so, I want to settle this with him once and for all.

重点:

entry.title: CCL房东串门
entry.content:
口译OriginalTranslated
E1Hello, Mr Zhang. I understand that you are having some problems with your landloard and want some advice from us. Can you tell me more about is?张先生, 你好！ 我知道你和你的房东有些矛盾， 所以希望征求我们的建议。 你能详细说说么？
M1是的。 我不知道到底我自己是对还是错的。 我是新来到这个国家的， 我对这里的法律不大熟悉。 但我的房东经常跑到我的房子来Sure. I don’t know whether I am right or wrong. I am new to this country and don’t know much about the laws here. But my landlord is visiting me too often.
E2Has he ever asked for your premission or produced an order from the Consumer, Trader & Tenancy Tribunal?他没有征得我的同意， 或者从CTTT, 消费者， 商人与租务仲裁庭哪里申请到一份法令呢？
E2没有， 他从不事先通知我， 就将他的东西及垃圾放在后院。 当我抱怨时， 他就说这是他的房子， 他喜欢怎么做， 就可以怎么做。No. He always puts his things and garbage in the backyard without letting me know beforehand. When I complained about this to him, he just said he could do whatever he likes because it’s his house.
E3Well, that’s simply not right. The Residential Tenancy Agreements outline the landlord’s and the tenant’s basic rights. The landlord has the right to enter the premises but only with the tenant’s consent or with an order from the CTTT.嗯， 这就不对了。 住房租赁合同写明了房东和租客的权利。 房东只有在征得租客同意、 或者申请到了CTTT / (消费者商人与租务仲裁庭)的法令的前提下， 才能进入租客的房间。
M3我告诉他， 我认为这样做是错的， 说我们也有权利。 他呢， 当我跟他说时， 却嘲笑我。 你能否告诉我， 作为租户我有什么权利呢？I told him, I thought he has making that wrong, and we have the right. But he don’t listen and laugh at me. Can you tell me, what legal right I have as a tanent.
E4Es a tenant you are entitled to your privacy as long as you comply with your obligaations under the lease. The landlord can’t just come whenever he pleases.作为租客只要你遵守租约规定的义务， 你有隐私权。 房东不能想来就来。
M4可能我不知道自己应该负些什么责任。 我在签字时并不明白自己签的是什么， 因为我不懂英语。Perhaps I don’t know what obligations I have. I didn’t understand what it said on the contract when I signed it, because I don’t understand English.
E5Well, you should have had an interpreter with you. In any case, your obligations are to pay the rent on time, to keep the place clean and in good order, and to tell the landlord of any repairs that are needed.嗯， 你当时应该找个口译员陪着你。 无论如何， 你的责任是安置时交房租； 保持房屋整洁； 如果房屋需要修补， 通知房东。
M5是的， 我们做的事一直是正确的。 而且我们还同他房子里需要修理的东西， 但他都一一拒绝， 他还说这些修理要用我们什么的押金去支付Yes, we always do the right thing and we told him what repairs needed to be done to the house but he refused our requests. He said that the cost of any repairs would come out of our bond or something.
E6That’s terrible! Your landlord obviously doesn’t know what he’s talking about. You need to make an application to the CTTT if you want to stay there, unless of course, you’d prefer to move out of the place.这太糟糕了！您的房东显然不知道他在说什么。除非您希望搬出那个地方，不然如果您想继续住在那里，你就需要向CTTT提出申请。
M6你这么一说我有底气多了。 我这就去维护我的合法权益！I am more confident now with all the information you’ve given me. I’m going to fight (Defend; Advocate) for my legal rights.

重点:

migration review tribunal (移民审仲裁庭)refugee review tribunal (难民上诉仲裁庭)social security tribunal (社会保障仲裁庭)Consumer, Trader & Tenancy Tribunal - CTTT (消费者商人与租务仲裁庭)

entry.title: CCL腰疼开药
entry.content:
IDOriginalTranslated
E1Good morning. How are you today?早上好今天感觉如何？
M1我今天感觉不错， 不过大夫。 上次我腰疼你开给我的大哥消炎药处方用完了， 能不能再给我开一张？I am good today. But doctor, I’ve used up the anti-inflammatory medicine you prescribed to me for my lower back pains. Could you please give me another prescription?
E2Hmm. That prescription should have lasted you three month. Do you mean to say that you’ve used it all?嗯， 这张处方药应够你吃三个月的， 你是说药全吃完了么？
M2是的， 那个药不太猛， 有时我一天吃三四片晚上才不会疼的睡不着。 但是吃了这高药之后胃里就老泛酸。Yes. That medicine is not that effective and sometimes I have to take three or four pills so I won’t be kept awake by the pain at night. But I was often belching a lot after taking it. (Got acid Reflux 反酸)
E3That’s one of the common side effects of that mediction. I would recommend for you not to take it more than once a day from now on, because an excessive dosage (用量) can damge the kidneys.这是这种药的正常副作用之一。 我建议你现在开始一天只吃一次药， 因为过量服药会损害肾脏。
M3那可不行。 我这个月全靠(Rely on it/count on it)它了， 老骨头痛起(The Pain of my old Bone)来什么可真不是开玩笑的。 根本睡不着觉， 什么都不能做。No way. I have to count on it this month. I’m not kidding about how painful it is when it aches. I can’t sleep and can’t perform daily activities.
E4when you came last time, you side you injured your back when you tried to hold grandson. Any soft tissue injuries you might have sustained whould have improved by now.上个月你来的时候， 你说你抱孙子的时候伤了腰。 你造成的软组织尊上现在应该改善了
M4刚开始的时候到不怎么痛， 不过现在连咳嗽、 打喷嚏也会痛， 更别 (Let alone / Not to mention) 说弯腰(bending over)了。 大夫， 我这是怎么了？It wasn’t that bad at the beginning but now it hurts every time I cough or sneeze, let alone bending over. What’s happend to me doctor?
E5the technical name of your condition is lumbago (腰痛病), it can be caused by lots of differen things. I’m going to examine you now and book in some tests to determine the cause of your pain.你的病症的学名叫腰痛， 也就是说背的下部疼。 很多情况都会引起你腰疼。 我现在要给你做个检查， 还要让你做几项化验， 来弄清引你腰疼痛的原因。
M5好的， 不过我还是想要一张消炎药的厨房I see but I would still like to have an anti-inflammatory prescription.
E6I will give you another prescritpion, but I will only prescribe one-month’s supply, because when the test results come out we may need to switch you over to a more appropriate analgesic (止痛剂)我会再给你开张消炎药的厨房， 但这次我只会开一个月的量， 因为等化验结果出来， 我们可能要换一个更合适的止痛药。
M6好的， 医生， 谢谢， 我会按你说的做的， 结果出来后， 我再来。Ok Doctor, Thank you. I will follow your instructions and will make an appointment with you once the results come out.

重点:

entry.title: CCL酒驾争端
entry.content:
IDOriginalTranslated
E1Ah here is the interpreter. Now we’ll be able to understand each other.翻译员来了， 现在我们可以明白彼此在说什么了。
M1太好了， 你终于来了！ 我要让他们给我解释为什么要这么对待我。他们有什么权利拘捕我？ 我有做错什么么？Greate, you are finally here! I want them to explain why they’ve treated me this way. What right do they have to arrest me? Have I done someting wrong?
E2You have been brought here to the police station becase you refused to take a breath test, and we have reason to believe you were driving under the influence of alcohol你被带到警局是因为你拒绝接受呼吸测试， 而且我们有理由相信你刚才的驾驶收到了酒精的影响。
M2放屁！ 我没喝醉。 我只是在酒吧和朋友喝了几杯， 根本没喝多。 我完全清醒， 也可以开车。 有个小伙子拦下我， 说我喝醉了， 让我朝那个什么。。。玩意吹气。 我可不愿意Bullshit! I was not drunk. I just drank a bit with my friends at the pub and it was not much at all. I’m completely sober (冷静) and able to drive. Then a young man stopped me, saying I was drunk and asked me to blow the … thing. I didn’t want to do that.
E3That was police constable (警员——低级别) Johnson, who saw you driving down Parramatta Rd in a dangerous manner, when he stopped you, you are abusive and refused to do the breath test. That means you are have already committed an offence, even you are under the limit.那是我们的警员约翰逊， 他说你以一种危险的方式(driving down)沿着’帕拉马塔’路驾驶， 当他拦住你时， ( Abusive )你态度恶劣并拒绝进行呼气测醉， 这意味着即使你没有超过酒精标准， 你还是犯了罪
M3违法？ 什么叫违法？ 从什么时候开始和朋友看球赛转播也算是违法了？ 你们都是些种族主义者。 你们专挑无辜的人， 就是因为我们不会说英文。Offence? What offence? Since when has watcing sports with your friends been regarded as an offence? You are all racists. You always pick on innocent people just because we don’t speak English.
E4You’re not doing yourself any favours carrying on like that. I suggest you calm down and take the breath test. Otherwise it will be assumed that you are over the prescribed limit and you will be charged with PCA.你像现在这样做下去对你没有任何的好处， 我建议你冷静下拉并进行呼吸测醉。 否则你会被假定醉酒超标， 并将受到PCA指控
M4哼， 好吧。 这该死的国家他妈的根本就没有正义可言。 把这该死的东西给我， 我来吹口气。 快点结束拉倒。Fine, okay. There is no justice in this damn / （Funcking） country. Give me this damn thing, and let me blow. I want an end to it.
E5Hmm, it shows a reading of 0.15, which is well over the limit. We’ll be charging you what a high-range PCA offence. If you could have over your licence, sir?嗯，它显示的读数为0.15，远远超出限制标准。我们将向您收取高额PCA违法行为。先生可以将您的驾照给我么？
M5我才不给你驾照呢， 如果没了驾照， 我怎么去工作啊？ 你知道， 我要养家的。I’m not giving you my driver’s license. How am I supposed to work without it? You know, I have to feed my family!
E6You should have thought of that before you got into your car under the influence of alcohol. You’ll be appearing before a magistrate at 10 a.m. tomorrow morning.您喝醉后到车里之前就该考虑过这一点。您明天早上10点会出庭。
M6上法庭就上法庭， 想整我？ 没那么容易。Fine by me! You want to give me a hard time? It won’t be that easy!

拓展：

  • Driving Under the Influence vs Driving with a Prescribed Content of Alcohol

entry.title: CCL男女朋友
entry.content:
IDOriginalTranslated
E1Good morning. I’m Mathew and I’ll be assisting you today. So what have you made this appointment for?早上好。我是Mathew，今天将为您提供帮助。那么，您此次预约的目的是什么呢？
M1我对自己的状态很不满意。 我觉得很难想别人敞开心扉。 我想我应该要提升一下自信。I’m very unsatisfied with myself. It is difficult for me to open myself up to other people. I think I need to boost my self-confidence.
E2Can you tell me a little bit about yourself? What’s your current situation? Do you live at home?你能简单介绍一下你自己吗? 你现在住在家里么?
M2是的， 我现在和我的男朋友Sam一起住。 我和他在一起很长时间了， 关系很稳定。Yes, I live with my boyfriend Sam. We’ve been together for a long time and it’s a pretty stable relationship.
E3Ok, You were telling me about your thoughts and feelings and about how you can’t open up. Do you feel that’s affecting your relationship with Sam, considering he is the primary person in your life?好的，您是在告诉我您的想法和感受，以及您如何无法敞开心扉。考虑到他是您生活中的主要人物， 您是否认为这会影响您与Sam的关系？
M3嗯 ··· 我想是的。 现在你这么说了我想是的。 Sam 又时会怀疑是否应该相信我。 比如我对他说我爱你， 他不知道是不是真的， 因为我对于表达自己的感受有困难。Hmm… I think so. Now that you mention it, I do feel it might be like that. Sam would sometimes doubt whether he should trust me. For example when I tell him I love you, he would wonder whether it is true, because I have difficulty expressing my feelings.
E4Ok, do you think the issue is with yourself or Sam? Do you think he is struggling to open up to you or?好的，您认为问题出在您自己还是Sam？ 您是否认为他正在努力向你敞开心扉？
M4我觉得他不觉得对我敞开心扉很困难。 我只是不确定敞开心扉是不是一件好事。 他总是说我不跟他说自己生活中发生的事， 这说明我不信任他。 但我并不是这么想的。 我只是觉得这是个人的事， 我不想和别人说。I don’t think he is struggling to open up to me. I’m just not sure whether opening up is a good thing. He always says that I don’t tell him about what’s happening in my life, hwich means I don’t trust him. But that’s not true. I just think this is personal stuff, which I don’t want to share with others.
E5I think we need to sort this issue out with your boyfriend if he’s stuggling to deal with the fact that you can’t open up to him. We may need to have a consultation with both of you because it is clear to me that he doesn’t understand your feelings. Would you agree?我认为我们需要解决你男友是否因为你不能敞开心扉而感到挣扎这个事情。 我们可能需要给你们两位进行一次会诊， 以为在我看来他不理解你的感受。 你同意吗？
M5是的， 我觉得他并不理解我所经受的痛苦。 他并没有意识到这是我的选择。Yes, I don’t think he understands what I’ve been through. He doesn’t realise this is my choice.
E6Yse, absolutely. We should all have freedom to make our own decisions. Would you like to have another appointment with just me next session or you want to bring Sam here as well?是的， 完全正确。 我们有自由做出自己的决定。 我希望下次的见面带上SAM, 还是只有你和我？
M6就咱俩吧。 我还没有准备好跟Sam谈这个事， 我还需要一点时间Just you and me. I am not ready to talk about this with Sam. Ineed more time.
